svg.text: Autonomous On-Chain Grant Allocator — System Architecture
Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4 + Framer Motion
10 orgs: YC, Solana Foundation, a16z, Gitcoin...
+8 per approval, -12 per rejection to reputation
Browser Agent on port 6969 — 6 platforms in parallel
5 Criteria: Impact (25%) • Feasibility (20%) • Credibility (25%) • Budget (15%) • Mission (15%)
+ Risk assessment: budget / team / timeline / market
+ Reputation-aware: feeds platform data + partner matches into prompt
+ Partner boost (YC, Solana Foundation, a16z, Gitcoin...)
+ Historical: +8 per past approval, -12 per past rejection
Solana Devnet — All transactions verifiable on Explorer
13 tables • Write-through cache • Founder profiles persist
proposals • founders • audit_records • treasury_transactions • fund_pools • milestones • agent_events
Transaction ledger • 4 fund pools • Balance sheet
Multi-sig approvals (>$15K) • Treasury alerts • Milestone-based funding (30/30/40 tranches)
